text.title: Feature Flag Types and Lifecycle Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the feature-flags-types-lifecycle methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: interview-flag
step.action: Ask: rollout? experiment? kill-switch? entitlement? Map to one of four kinds.

step.name: set-retire-by
step.action: Compute retire_by: release=+30d, experiment=+28d, ops=null, permission=null.

step.name: assign-owner
step.action: Set owner field; reject if null.
step.decision-gate: Reject classification record without an owner.

step.name: wire-audit
step.action: Configure stale-flag audit (see feature-flags-services-testing) to use retire_by.
